name: generator-kv
description: Generate SoloMkt-KV marketing key visual poster images through a guided OpenCode/Codex workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Generate SoloMkt-KV marketing key visuals from natural language.
interface.longDescription: Generator-KV helps users configure a SoloMkt-KV API key, validates the configuration, fetches the latest available models before every request, guides model selection, collects required activity fields, and calls the generateKV API with a friendly 10-minute generation timeout.
defaultPrompt: Use Generator-KV to configure my API key.
List SoloMkt-KV models before generating a KV.
Generate an event KV poster from my activity details.
